description_long: This is a stylized anthropomorphic doll resembling a cartoon mouse character, featuring a large round head with prominent circular ears and a polka-dotted bow on top. The face is painted with a blue and white mask-like pattern, and the doll has a small, round nose. It wears a light blue dress adorned with black polka dots, matching the bow, and has black gloves on its hands. The legs are short and end in rounded feet, one of which is pink and the other blue, adding a playful asymmetry. The overall form is smooth and rounded, with a glossy finish that suggests a plastic or vinyl construction.
description: A cartoon mouse-inspired doll with a blue polka-dot dress, bow, and black gloves, featuring a smooth, glossy surface and playful color accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, polka-dot bow, blue dress, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding nose, and the curvature of the dress and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, bow, and dress, with no facial features visible and both arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, ear, and the layered look of the dress and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a light blue, short-sleeved dress with black polka dots, paired with a matching polka-dot bow on the head. The style is reminiscent of classic cartoon character fashion, with black gloves and mismatched shoes—one pink and one blue—adding playful, whimsical elements.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs slightly apart, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical, typical of a display or T-pose.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a small round nose, wide eyes, and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and covered by a large polka-dot bow.
